title: OC2R: Valkyrien Skies
description: To starships and beyond with computers involved
body:
Welcome to **OC2R: Valkyrien Skies**. This mod has full integration with **OpenComputers II: Reimagined** by adding a **Ship Operations Module** card for computers to utilize and access a new HDAPI for retrieving data about a given Ship! We will try to maintain all versions that OC2R: Valkyrien Skies has.





We use the following server provider:
![https://serversforyou.com/aff.php?aff=8](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5451347b0e999f706728598b171f3129319edcfd.png)
